mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.payment_code, p.order_code, p.work_id, p.auction_id, p.original_amount, p.total_price, p.total_fee, p.payment_purpose, p.pay_method, p.pg_receipt_id, p.status, p.paid_at, p.created_datetime, COALESCE(w.title, '삭제된 작품 결제') AS work_title, ( SELECT wf.file_url FROM tbl_work_file wf WHERE wf.work_id = p.work_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN wf.file_type LIKE 'image/%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, wf.sort_order ASC, wf.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS work_thumbnail, s.nickname AS seller_nickname, o.license_type FROM tbl_payment p LEFT JOIN tbl_order o ON p.order_code = o.order_code LEFT JOIN tbl_work w ON p.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tbl_member s ON p.seller_id = s.id WHERE p.id = #{paymentId}

SELECT id, payment_code, order_code, buyer_id, seller_id, work_id, auction_id, original_amount, total_price, total_fee, payment_purpose, pay_method, card_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, created_datetime FROM tbl_payment WHERE id = #{paymentId}

SELECT p.id, p.payment_code, p.order_code, p.work_id, p.auction_id, p.original_amount, p.total_price, p.total_fee, p.payment_purpose, p.pay_method, p.pg_receipt_id, p.status, p.paid_at, p.created_datetime, COALESCE(w.title, '삭제된 작품 결제') AS work_title, ( SELECT wf.file_url FROM tbl_work_file wf WHERE wf.work_id = p.work_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN wf.file_type LIKE 'image/%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, wf.sort_order ASC, wf.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS work_thumbnail, s.nickname AS seller_nickname, o.license_type FROM tbl_payment p LEFT JOIN tbl_order o ON p.order_code = o.order_code LEFT JOIN tbl_work w ON p.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tbl_member s ON p.seller_id = s.id WHERE p.payment_code = #{paymentCode}

SELECT id, payment_code, order_code, buyer_id, seller_id, work_id, auction_id, original_amount, total_price, total_fee, payment_purpose, pay_method, card_id, pg_receipt_id, status, paid_at, refunded_at, created_datetime FROM tbl_payment WHERE order_code = #{orderCode} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'AUTHORIZED') ORDER BY created_datetime DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.payment_code, p.order_code, p.work_id, p.auction_id, p.original_amount, p.total_price, p.total_fee, p.payment_purpose, p.pay_method, p.pg_receipt_id, p.status, p.paid_at, p.created_datetime, COALESCE(w.title, '삭제된 작품 결제') AS work_title, ( SELECT wf.file_url FROM tbl_work_file wf WHERE wf.work_id = p.work_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN wf.file_type LIKE 'image/%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, wf.sort_order ASC, wf.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS work_thumbnail, s.nickname AS seller_nickname, o.license_type FROM tbl_payment p LEFT JOIN tbl_order o ON p.order_code = o.order_code LEFT JOIN tbl_work w ON p.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tbl_member s ON p.seller_id = s.id WHERE p.buyer_id = #{buyerId} AND p.auction_id = #{auctionId} AND p.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY p.created_datetime DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.payment_code, p.order_code, p.work_id, p.auction_id, p.original_amount, p.total_price, p.total_fee, p.payment_purpose, p.pay_method, p.pg_receipt_id, p.status, p.paid_at, p.created_datetime, COALESCE(w.title, '삭제된 작품 결제') AS work_title, ( SELECT wf.file_url FROM tbl_work_file wf WHERE wf.work_id = p.work_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN wf.file_type LIKE 'image/%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, wf.sort_order ASC, wf.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS work_thumbnail, s.nickname AS seller_nickname, o.license_type FROM tbl_payment p LEFT JOIN tbl_order o ON p.order_code = o.order_code LEFT JOIN tbl_work w ON p.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tbl_member s ON p.seller_id = s.id WHERE p.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY p.created_datetime DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_payment WHERE buyer_id = #{buyerId}
